programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: An unknown killer executes a seemingly perfect family in their upscale Florida home. As detective EvaMarie Multari searches for answers, she uncovers hidden family tensions and a maniacal scheme driven by an obsessive love affair with a webcam model.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police watch the disturbing video of a young woman closing up after her shift at a gas station convenience store. Everything seems normal until, in one moment, she is there and, in the next, she is gone, never to be seen again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When two young women are murdered on the same scenic bike trail just months apart, police are baffled by the similarities of their deaths.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: Two employees of Dayton, a bar in Ohio, are beaten to death; on the case, Det. Doyle Burke investigates a series of bizarre clues, including a citywide KKK rally and a mysterious confession letter from The Devil postmarked from Hell.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: On April 10, 2016, 45-year-old Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends, then investigators find her eyeglasses in a pool of blood; a surveillance video shows an attack, and police race to find Hudson before it's too late.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: A woman is shot dead during her morning jog through a normally peaceful neighborhood in Glendale, Ariz.; home surveillance footage enables detectives to identify the shooter's vehicle.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Family members are shocked to learn that Patricia Kimble was shot before her body was consumed in a deliberately set house fire; investigators scour her diary for clues as to who would want to kill the devout Christian newlywed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Candice Parchment goes missing from her Georgia home and is found murdered months later; the investigation hits a dead end until the discovery of Candice's diary reveals a shocking assault and points to the person who killed her.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: If I Should Die
programme.desc: Conrad and Ricky Morales are happily living with their uncle and his wife in Washington State, but when Conrad goes missing, and Ricky later dies under suspicious circumstances, it falls to Conrad's diary to explain the truth about the family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: In a small town in Florida, a charismatic pastor and his wife take in a young woman from their congregation, and months later they announce her as a surrogate for their child; when she disappears, the true story begins to emerge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: In rural Kentucky, police receive a distressing call about the brutal killing of a family in their home; authorities learn the son is the sole survivor of the attack by a disgruntled ex-handyman, but his recollection of the murder doesn't add up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: Police find a family savagely murdered in their quiet suburban Oklahoma home, but when police find a victim still clinging to life and able to provide some answers, they launch a desperate search for the perpetrators before they can kill again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: Amina and Sarah Said long to live the lives of typical American teenagers, but when they push back against the rules of their traditionalist father, tensions simmer inside the family and come to an explosive conclusion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: In small-town upstate New York, a young mother loses her 5-year-old son, who's battled a medical condition that has plagued him since birth; doctors claim his death is not from a natural cause, and investigators soon suspect foul play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Right before Thanksgiving, two masked gunmen reportedly invade a couple's home and kill the husband; with few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in "The Killing Fields," then he's gunned down outside his Los Angeles home, and the LAPD investigates a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge prompts an investigation of epic proportions by the FBI, U.S. Marshals and Chicago Police Department; at the end of the trail, law enforcement personnel learn the death count may climb higher.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: NBA basketball player Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, Tenn., then his body is discovered in the woods, and investigators find out this case is far from a slam dunk.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1988, a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, Calif., home, leading police to investigate the strife and infidelity in her marriage; a surprising witness eventually comes forward.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Washington D.C. is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls; police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A mother's bond to her daughter is put to the ultimate test when one of them shoots a man dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: We Are Jeni
programme.desc: Jeni Haynes creates hundreds of different personalities, or alters, to try to cope with the horrific abuse inflicted by her dad. For years, no one believes her story - until Jeni and her alters resolve to get justice and bring her father to trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.desc: "48 Hours" began as a documentary in 1986 and became a regular series two years later. It was built around a team of correspondents covering one subject for 48 consecutive hours. Over time it evolved into the premiere broadcast for law, crime and justice stores -- its journalists, for example, have been credited with uncovering new information that has led to high-profile cases being overturned and wrongfully convicted people released from prison. The large library of episodes are revisited in "48 Hours on ID," focusing on investigations that explore themes of jealousy, murder and deceit.

programme.title: We Are Jeni
programme.desc: Jeni Haynes creates hundreds of different personalities, or alters, to try to cope with the horrific abuse inflicted by her dad. For years, no one believes her story - until Jeni and her alters resolve to get justice and bring her father to trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.desc: "48 Hours" began as a documentary in 1986 and became a regular series two years later. It was built around a team of correspondents covering one subject for 48 consecutive hours. Over time it evolved into the premiere broadcast for law, crime and justice stores -- its journalists, for example, have been credited with uncovering new information that has led to high-profile cases being overturned and wrongfully convicted people released from prison. The large library of episodes are revisited in "48 Hours on ID," focusing on investigations that explore themes of jealousy, murder and deceit.

programme.desc: A mother's bond to her daughter is put to the ultimate test when one of them shoots a man dead.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In Craig, Ala., townspeople are shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman; people have no idea who would want to kill her, then an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In Grand Prairie, Texas, a game of truth-or-dare leads to a startling confession in the 1995 shooting death of 16-year-old Adrianne Jones.

programme.title: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Wendy Kratzert's body is found in her van, which appears to have skidded off a mountain road, but investigators suspect foul play and retrace the victim's last movements.

programme.title: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: After Kristine Fitzhugh is found dead at the bottom of her basement stairs, detectives soon begin investigating her accidental fall as a homicide and strive to locate the actual scene of her death.

programme.title: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: One night, cellist Janine Sutphen fails to return from symphony practice, and her husband tells police there's more to his wife than anyone knows.

programme.title: Dead Silent
programme.desc: Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to spend a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Dead Silent
programme.sub-title: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: In Santa Cruz, Calif., 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979; then, years later, the murder of another local teenager, Lois Sigala, gives investigators a lead that puts them one step closer to solving Jozavich's case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dead Silent
programme.desc: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mother Marie Huckins; then, 20 years later, her daughter, Patricia, finds herself following in the same fateful footsteps.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Dancer Jodi Sanderholm spends weeks practicing for her team's big performance, then vanishes hours before the event, which doesn't make sense until a friend comes forward with strange details about the days leading up to Jodi's disappearance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes; Holliday is taken hostage by an unstable individual, but she manages to call a 911 operator, who will stop at nothing to save her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: After separating from her husband of 13 years, 36-year-old Julie Curry Boyd suddenly finds her life in danger and stops at nothing to keep her three children safe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: The wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets the veterinary nurse Lana Walsh and is love at first sight. But the devout couple is not immune to the tragedies of life and, when a premature death raises questions, a disturbing and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Joy and Fred are typical high school sweethearts until a tragic work accident changes the course of their lives; as Joy tries to find a second shot at love, she confronts a heartbreaking tragedy.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Jean Schwarzkopf, a wealthy and glamorous 78 -year -old widow, is determined not to give up life and soon becomes an element of Florida's social scene. Jean's new friends are not everything they seem and his family is dragged into a dark world of crime and violence.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Rob and Lisa Whedbee are a beautiful couple who turn heads wherever they go; then a medical trauma upends their happy family, setting them on a path of destruction that will end in lies, accusations and a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Surrounded by a big, loving family, high achiever Keonte Chavis goes missing, then she is found strangled to death in the woods, and the perpetrator turns out to be a family member.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Michelle looks up to her father, but over time, fear and disgust replaces respect; as a teen, her world changes forever as horrific revelations buried for years finally emerge; Michelle's father must answer for his crimes.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Raised in foster care, Kristin and Brandon only had each other; Kristin struggles to understand how her big brother became a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Going inside prison walls to interview evil itself as relatives of killers, along with killers themselves, tell their chilling tales; questions these killers have never been asked before result in powerful, unsettling and contentious encounters.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Katie always knew her grandpa, Buster, as a kind man; he has a dark past but is the center of their big, close family; then comes the murder; he is not the man Katie thought she knew; she finally learns the hard truth about her grandfather.
